title: J2CL bootstrap JSON cleanup
summary: J2CL root and sidecar bootstrap now rely on /bootstrap.json only after the temporary root-HTML scraping overlap window.

items: Removes the deprecated J2CL root HTML bootstrap scraper and Lit inline-shell fallback while preserving the legacy GWT host page globals.
Moves J2CL WebSocket host resolution into /bootstrap.json so trusted forwarded host handling survives after the root shell stops emitting inline socket globals.
